about.title: Peter Sol
about.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
aboutParagraphs: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building web applications. I specialize in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.
My journey in software development started during my computer science studies at university. Since then, I've worked on diverse projects ranging from e-commerce platforms to data visualization tools.

I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and staying up-to-date with the latest technologies. When I'm not coding, you can find me contributing to open-source projects or mentoring junior developers.
funFacts: I started coding when I was 12 years old with BASIC on an old computer.
I've contributed to over 20 open-source projects on GitHub.
I love solving algorithmic puzzles and competitive programming challenges.
I'm a big fan of the TV show The Office.

items.title: Rotman Commerce Fashion Group
items.aboutBody: A fashion business club run by University of Toronto students that revolves around core values of education, community, and networking in the fashion industry. The purpose of RCFG is to provide Rotman Commerce students the opportunity to connect on fashion and beauty topics such as global trends, styling advice, fashion careers, and business fashion.
items.journeyBody:
Director of Creative Content Feb 2024 - Present
Manager of Creative Content Feb 2023 - Feb 2024
items.artworkBody: The Creative Content team was responsible for designing artwork for this year's team. Below are some rough ideas and iterations upon receiving feedback:
items.creativePostsIntro: Our team thinks of creative ways to promote club events and, when there are no upcoming events, executes large creative projects such as street interviews and Instagram takeovers to keep our audience entertained and maintain consistent uploads.
items.thriftStats:
This September, to promote our Thrifting in Toronto event, we created a scrapbook style post to showcase executive team thrift finds.
759 Accounts Reached · 85.7% from followers · 14.3% from non-followers.
leadershipBullets: Directed a group of 5 committee members to increase engagement and maximize event attendance.
Worked closely with Marketing Directors to organize a content calendar and upload schedule.
Encouraged idea generation and delegated tasks to committee members based on their strengths.
Kept up with Instagram/TikTok trends and executed creative fashion content posts.
items.creativeReelsBody: Event Recaps, Day in the Life, and more coming soon...

projects.title: My Projects
projects.intro: Here are some of the projects I've worked on recently. Each one represents a unique challenge and learning experience.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution built with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Features include user authentication, payment processing, and admin dashboard.

projects.title: Data Visualization Tool
projects.description: An interactive dashboard for visualizing complex datasets. Built with D3.js and React, it supports real-time data updates and multiple chart types.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: I'm always interested in new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
